name: Raleigh-Durham, North Carolina

rent.notes: North Carolina has no rental tax. Research Triangle area with strong demand. Water, sewage, and trash are separate utility bills (not included in rent).
rent.gigInternetNotes: Google Fiber covers 56% of Raleigh, AT&T 80%. Research Triangle area well-served. Durham has similar coverage. New Google Fiber neighborhoods in Chapel Hill/Carrboro.

electricity.notes: Duke Energy Progress. A/C in summer, heat pump common. Moderate 4-season climate.

gas.notes: PSNC Energy (Dominion). Natural gas heating (Nov–Mar), cooking.

water.notes: Raleigh Public Utilities / Durham Water Mgmt.

sewage.notes: Billed with water. Wake County / Durham wastewater.

trash.notes: City of Raleigh Solid Waste. Weekly curbside collection.

utilities.taxes: North Carolina: 7% combined sales tax applies to electricity and gas. Water/sewer exempt.
utilities.notes: Electricity (heating+cooling), gas, water, sewage, trash. Internet is in entertainment (Cable+1Gig).

healthcare.notes: Medicare Part B ($174.70/mo) + Medigap Plan G (~$200/mo x2 people) + Part D (~$45/mo x2) + dental/vision plans. Higher premiums reflect macular degeneration specialist coverage and frequent monitoring needs.

petCare.notes: Vet visits, vaccinations, flea/tick, pet insurance

petDaycare.notes: Doggy daycare 2 days/week, large breed rate (~$40/day). Camp Bow Wow, Dogtopia Raleigh.

petGrooming.notes: Bernese coat maintenance, professional grooming monthly

transportation.notes: Car-dependent; GoRaleigh bus, GoDurham Transit in cities

entertainment.notes: Incl cable+1Gig internet, Netflix, Amazon Prime, Apple TV+, dining out (lunch for 2 2x/week w/ tax+tip)

phoneCell.notes: T-Mobile 55+ Essentials. 2 phones, 1.5GB+ high-speed data each, all taxes included.

buffer.notes: Monthly safety buffer for unexpected expenses

medicalOOP.notes: Anti-VEGF injections for macular degeneration (~$300-400 OOP each, 6-10x/yr after Medicare 80%). Specialist visits: ophthalmologist q6-8wks, endocrinologist 2-4x/yr, cardiologist 1-2x/yr. Frequent labs: lipid panel, TSH, A1C, CMP 3-4x/yr each. Both adults: PCP visits quarterly.

medicine.notes: Monthly prescription medication costs for household

taxes.notes: Estimated monthly income tax on $72,000/yr household income. Based on jurisdiction's effective retiree rate; excludes sales/VAT/property tax.

healthcarePreMedicare.notes: ACA silver benchmark for 2-adult household both age ~60, before subsidies. County-level estimate (Wake County, NC). Raleigh-Durham — competitive metro marketplace. Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

stateIncomeTax.exemptions: NC flat 4.5% rate (2026, reduced from 4.75% in 2025). SS fully exempt from NC tax. No retirement income exclusion beyond SS exemption.

taxes.notes: NC flat state income tax with SS exemption. No retirement income exclusion beyond SS.

acaMarketplace.disclaimer: Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

pros: World-class healthcare (Duke University Hospital, UNC Hospitals)
Moderate cost of living for metro area
cons: State income tax on retirement withdrawals (no exclusion beyond SS)
